case_title: JEANELLE CATHERINE KAMMER VS. SCOTT ROBINSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SCOTT

ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-05-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JEANELLE KAMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-07-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JEANELLE KAMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORP. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MATTHEW TOM, AREA MANAGER. DEFENDANT SCOTT ROBINSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANT'S. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORP. WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAMMER, JEANELLE CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, SCOTT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF JEANELLE KAMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JAZMINE RANSOM, MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAMMER, JEANELLE CATHERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE HERTZ CORPORATION PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF BUT HAS OFFERED NO EVIDENCE THAT HERTZ CORP'S INSURED DROVE THE CAR THAT HIT HER CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO SCOTT ROBINSON ON 10/02/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-18-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JEANELLE KAMMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SCOTT ROBINSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
